title: adenostemma lavenia var. angustifolium
intro: Adenostemma lavenia var. angustifolium is a variant of the Adenostemma lavenia plant, a type of flowering shrub native to tropical regions, particularly in the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Adenostemma lavenia var. angustifolium include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in the management of diabetes and hypertension. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for consumption, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
